docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED, CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED NOV-02-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARMAN, GARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARMAN, GARY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL SERVED JAN-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARMAN, GARY
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-17-2017 IS CONTINUED CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-18-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR RECEIVES THE NEXT SCHEDULED PAYMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR MICHAEL BROWN. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2017 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT THE PARTIES TO JUN-19-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR RECEIVES THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $190.00 BY JUNE 1, 2017. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR MICHAEL BROWN. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

JUDGMENT CREDITOR MICHAEL BROWN IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR GARY BARMAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2017 IS FOR PROGRESS REPORT THE PARTIES TO APR-17-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,715.00 FILED BY BROWN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT GARMAN, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GARMAN, GARY HEARING SET FOR FEB-23-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
